subject: Hang in generic/648 on zoned btrfs after aa35dd5cbc06 ("iomap: fix invalid folio access after folio_end_read()")

reviews.author: Joanne Koong
reviews.summary: Proposed changes to iomap_read_folio_iter() to fix a hang issue in generic/648 on zoned btrfs, including adding an extra ifs_alloc() call and checking for the existence of ifs before advancing the read.

2026-03-10.patch_summary: Patch author Joanne Koong submitted a diff to fix a hang issue in generic/648 on zoned btrfs after the iomap patch.
